module.name: no-floating-promises
module.description: Disallow floating promises; explicitly handle with await, void, or rejection handlers.

scenarios.name: should allow an awaited promise
scenarios.given: an async function that awaits a promise-returning call

scenarios.name: should allow a promise with a .catch() rejection handler
should allow a promise prefixed with void
should report a promise call whose result is not awaited or handled
scenarios.given: a statement that calls an async function without await, void, or .catch

scenarios.name: should report a promise returned from a then() callback without handling
scenarios.given: a .then() callback that returns a new unhandled promise
